creator: casey.langen@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I'm the creator/maintainer of musikcube (https://github.com/clangen/musikcube), but I do not maintain the port.

I recently installed FreeBSD on my system and found the app crashes on startup. After some spelunking around, I found that it seems to be caused by linking against the ncurses library in `/lib`. 

If I go into /usr/local/ports/multimedia/musikcube and remove the following line from the Makefile, then rebuild, all is fine:

CMAKE_ARGS=    -DNCURSES_LIBRARIES="cursesw;tinfow;panelw"

I'm not sure what the difference between the curses library in /lib and /usr/local/lib are, but the former seems to cause problems, so I'd suggest linking against the one in /usr/local/lib
